name: com.weppy.aiprovider
description: A friendly, plug-and-play package for unified AI chat, image generation (OpenAI, Gemini/Imagen, OpenRouter), and background removal.

samples.description: A simple runtime IMGUI sample demonstrating basic API-based chat functionality.
A simple runtime IMGUI sample demonstrating basic CLI-based chat functionality.
A simple runtime IMGUI sample demonstrating basic image generation functionality.
